About SCRAPYARD

Reinventing India's ₹5 Trillion Scrap Industry

India generates over 60 million tonnes of waste annually. Yet the scrap industry remains fragmented, opaque, and technologically backward. SCRAPYARD exists to fix that.

We've built a technology platform that connects scrap sellers directly with verified buyers, eliminates middlemen, ensures transparent pricing, and creates a sustainable recycling ecosystem across India.

Our Mission

Make scrap selling effortless, fair, and rewarding for every Indian

Our Vision

Build India's most trusted waste-to-value technology ecosystem

Our Approach

Tech-first, transparency-always, sustainability at core

Read Our Story

Core Brand Values

🤝Trust
🔍Transparency
⚡Technology
🌱Sustainability
🚀Speed
💰Better Pricing

Sustainability Commitment

By 2027, we aim to divert 100,000 MT of waste from landfills and reduce 50,000 tonnes of CO₂ annually through our recycling network.

Simple Process

How It Works

From scheduling to payment in 4 simple steps. Built for maximum simplicity.

STEP 01
Free of Cost

Schedule Pickup

Book a free doorstep pickup in under 60 seconds via app, website, or WhatsApp. Choose your preferred slot.

STEP 02
Same Day

Collection Team Arrives

Our uniformed, background-verified team arrives at your location with all necessary equipment.

STEP 03
Transparent

Instant Weight Verification

Transparent digital weighing at your doorstep. You see the weight, we show the calculation — no surprises.

STEP 04
Instant UPI

Instant Payment

Get paid instantly via UPI, bank transfer, or cash. No delays, no excuses — payment in 60 seconds.

Schedule My Free Pickup Now

No registration required. Book in under 60 seconds.

All Scrap Types

We Buy Everything

From household scrap to industrial waste — we handle it all at the best market rates.

⚙️

Metal Scrap

Iron, copper, aluminium, brass & more

From ₹22/kg
🧴

Plastic Scrap

PET, HDPE, PP, PVC & all polymers

From ₹12/kg
📄

Paper Scrap

Newspaper, cardboard, books

From ₹10/kg
💻

E-Waste

Laptops, mobiles, PCBs, batteries

From ₹80/pc
🪑

Old Furniture

Office & home furniture disposal

Best rates
🏭

Industrial Waste

Factory & manufacturing waste

Custom rates
🏗️

Construction Scrap

Demolition & building material

Custom rates
🚗

Vehicle Scrap

Old vehicles, parts, tyres

Best rates
🔌

Cable & Wire

Electrical cables, copper wire

From ₹180/kg

The SCRAPYARD app is your complete scrap management companion. Book pickups, track collections, get live rates, and receive instant payments — all in one place.

🏢 Enterprise Solutions

Scale Your Scrap Management

From small offices to large manufacturing plants — our enterprise platform handles scrap at any scale with full compliance, documentation, and dedicated support.

Regular pickup schedules

Our Advantage

Why Choose SCRAPYARD

We're not just another scrap dealer. We're a technology company that happens to buy scrap.

20% Higher

Best Market Rates

Get up to 20% higher than local dealers. Our algorithm ensures you always get fair market price.

Same Day

Fast Pickup

Same-day pickup in most cities. Our fleet is always ready — no more waiting for days.

100% Verified

Verified Buyers

Every buyer is background-verified, licensed, and GST-compliant. 100% trustworthy network.

Instant UPI

Secure Payments

Instant UPI transfers, bank deposits, or cash — your choice, your security.

50+ Cities

Nationwide Network

Operating in 50+ cities with 200+ verified collection partners across India.

Certified Green

Eco-Friendly

Every kg recycled saves CO₂ emissions. We&apos;re committed to a greener India.

🌱 Sustainability Impact

⭐ Customer Stories

Trusted by Thousands

Real customers, real results. Here's what our community says about SCRAPYARD.

“SCRAPYARD transformed how we handle factory scrap. We used to wait weeks for buyers, now we get same-day collection and instant payment. The rate transparency is excellent — no more haggling.”

RS

Rajesh Sharma

Plant Manager · Steel Fab Industries, Faridabad

₹2.4 Lakh

monthly

“We had 200+ old laptops and office furniture to dispose. SCRAPYARD sent a professional team, gave us the best rate in the market, and transferred payment via UPI within the hour. Absolutely seamless.”

PA

Priya Agarwal

Admin Manager · TechBridge Solutions, Noida

₹85,000

one-time

“For our demolition projects, SCRAPYARD is a game-changer. Their team handles all demolition scrap professionally, and the rates for iron and steel are always market-best. Highly reliable.”

MI

Mohammed Irfan

Contractor · Irfan Constructions, Delhi

₹1.8 Lakh

per project

“SCRAPYARD transformed how we handle factory scrap. We used to wait weeks for buyers, now we get same-day collection and instant payment. The rate transparency is excellent — no more haggling.”

RS

Rajesh Sharma

Plant Manager

💬 FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about SCRAPYARD.

SCRAPYARD is India's smartest digital scrap marketplace. You schedule a free pickup, our verified team arrives at your location, weighs your scrap on a digital scale, and transfers payment instantly via UPI or bank transfer. No waiting, no bargaining.

SCRAPYARD

India's smartest digital scrap marketplace. Transforming waste into value with technology, transparency, and trust.
